tests.source_program:
;test
;current seed:1581349751
; ModuleID = '/app/data/auto-opt/.tmp/tmpvvd13wdh.ll'
source_filename = "/app/data/auto-opt/.tmp/tmpvvd13wdh.ll"

define i1 @test(i32 %a, i1 %other_cond) {
entry:
  %cmp1 = icmp sgt i32 %a, -1
  %or.cond = select i1 %other_cond, i1 %cmp1, i1 false
  %0 = zext i1 %cmp1 to i32
  %1 = shl i32 1222305731, %0
  %cmp2 = icmp slt i32 %1, 10086
  %ret = select i1 %or.cond, i1 %cmp2, i1 false
  ret i1 %ret
}
